markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding buddy 1:1 to align on sales strategy and resources.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual Sales Focus:** Nigel will sell the new CheckDat SaaS, while Tyler sells the existing white-glove services. The long-term goal is for both to cross-sell.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Services Pitch:** The core pitch is that GrowthX's services deliver scalable, high-quality content by using a proprietary "Atlas" engine with agentic workflows and fact-checking, which is far more sophisticated than a client could build themselves.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
  - [**CheckDat's Rationale:** CheckDat exists to win the category by offering a scalable SaaS product, addressing the resource-intensive nature of white-glove services and leveraging GrowthX's proven expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3219.0)
  - [**Onboarding Gaps:** Nigel must define the CheckDat sales playbook from scratch. Tyler's services sales process, while effective, lacks scalable assets like published case studies and a reliable demo environment.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Scaling Sales & Defining the Future

  - [**Tyler's Services Sales:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Goal:** Close 2 deals/week (starting at $15k/mo) to meet company revenue targets.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Bottleneck:** Time is the primary constraint, limiting the creation of custom sales assets (e.g., content refreshes, search volume analyses) that would accelerate the sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Nigel's CheckDat Sales:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Define the sales playbook for a pre-launch product with no existing playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Significant freedom to shape the sales strategy and positioning based on past experience.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)

### The Solution: A Dual-Product Strategy

  - [**Why CheckDat?**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3219.0)
      - [**Scalability:** SaaS is inherently more scalable than white-glove services, which require significant resource deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
      - [**Category Leadership:** The vision is to win the category by building a product the "right way," leveraging GrowthX's deep expertise to outperform reactive competitors like Profound and Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
  - [**The Services Pitch in Detail:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
      - [**Core Value Prop:** Use GrowthX's proprietary "Atlas" engine to deliver scalable, high-quality content, freeing up client teams for strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2944.0)
      - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)
          - [**Agentic Workflows:** Complex, multi-step processes (e.g., research, drafting, validation) that are far more sophisticated than a client could build with a simple LLM prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2601.0)
          - [**Fact-Checking:** A crucial step that validates content accuracy against a confidence interval, proving reliability.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [**Proof Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
          - [**Augment Code Case Study:** 3x organic traffic in 6 months, achieving AI visibility comparable to the client's own brand.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
          - [**Live Demo:** Showing the Atlas workflow catalog and performing a live edit (e.g., adding persona-tailored bullet points) to demonstrate platform power.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)

### Onboarding Resources & Gaps

  - [**Key Resources for Nigel:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Linear Board:** Primary source for all onboarding tasks and links.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**"Priorities for the business" & "CheckDat specific" docs:** Foundational documents for high-level context.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Marcel's Origin Story:** The core narrative for all sales calls, explaining the company's "why."](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Airtable:** Searchable database of all client content (e.g., Strapi) to understand the range of technical depth.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
      - [**"AI-led growth" community:** A potential lead source for CheckDat.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [**Key Gaps to Address:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**CheckDat Sales Deck:** Non-existent; Nigel will need to collaborate with Marcel to create one.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**Services Sales Assets:** Tyler's demo environment is unreliable (500 errors after \~1 month), and published case studies are still in draft form.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3840.0)
      - [**Nigel's Quota:** Undefined; Bridget will provide clarity.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3733.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nigel:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3958.0)
      - [Review onboarding docs and listen to recent sales calls.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Prepare questions for Marcel during the upcoming SF trip.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Create a shared doc for ongoing questions.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3617.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3641.0)
      - [Provide Nigel with direct contact info (Slack, phone).](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3641.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3964.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call after Nigel reviews the materials.](https://fathom.video/share/a7eWzojfGjcS-A6pT48SKhuLWLtHy-wK?tab=summary&timestamp=3964.0)
